name: FarmCare
description: Most Zimbabweans' income comes from livestock and farming, so I created FarmCare to help farmers manage their livestock without lots of paperwork. It tracks vaccines, feeding schedules, and notes on individual animals.

name: Jamf API Suite
description: A collection of Bash and Python scripts that interact with the Jamf Pro API to manage computers, users, groups, and buildings via OAuth client credentials.

name: This Portfolio
description: An API-first portfolio site built with Flask, deployed to AWS Lambda, with CI/CD via GitHub Actions. Because a portfolio about engineering should itself be engineered properly.
